audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 421-427 load auctionStart from s_auctionStarts[asset] and check auctionStart == 0 || elapsedTime > assetParams.auctionDuration before any state mutations or transfers, exactly matching the property assertion. s_auctionStarts[asset] is only ever set to block.timestamp (monotonically non-decreasing), so underflow is impossible and the check fires on every code path through bid().
